authors.author: Rend Collective
Rend Collective
Mutig komm ich vor den Thron

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: By grace alone somehow I stand Where even angels fear to tread Invited by redeeming love Before the throne of God above He pulls me close with nail-scarred hands Into His everlasting arms

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When condemnation grips my heart And Satan tempts me to despair I hear the voice that scatters fear The Great I Am the Lord is here Oh praise the One who fights for me And shields my soul eternally

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Boldly I approach Your throne Blameless now I'm running home By Your blood I come Welcomed as Your own Into the arms of majesty

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Behold the bright and risen Son More beauty than this world has known I'm face to face with Love Himself His perfect spotless righteousness A thousand years, a thousand tongues Are not enough to sing His praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: This is the art of celebration Knowing we're free from condemnation Oh praise the One, praise the One Who made an end to all my sin :/
